message.content: Put out all the changes to /products/tasks/backend and /frontend as a stacked PR on top of the current one. Use Graphite

content.text: Let me first understand the current branch state and the relevant changes.

input.description: Check diff stats for tasks backend and frontend

f8450b9dbc1 fix: Tests.
e0c7b6e27ac chore: Tests.
f05d6699b98 Merge branch 'master' into signals/report-generation-agent
4a9694d8179 fix: Logs.
4c63558fba4 fix: Add dependency.
c7ebf6d3cc6 fix: Test.
3edc8f09297 fix: Pagination.
fbd86c38e12 feat(dashboards): allow toggling visibility of labels on insights directly from dashboards (#51610)
5ea561998ae feat: add SLO event framework for operation tracking (#51636)
8491fe78963 fix: Repo selection.

content.text:
Stacked PR created: https://app.graphite.com/github/pr/PostHog/posthog/52623

It's stacked on top of `signals/report-generation-agent` and includes the changes to:
- `frontend/src/lib/api.ts` — new `suggestedReviewers` API method
- `frontend/src/scenes/inbox/` — suggested reviewers UI (types, logic, components)
- `products/tasks/backend/services/connection_token.py` — `getattr` cleanup
- `products/tasks/frontend/lib/parse-logs.ts` — log parsing improvements + tests

The PR was created in draft mode. You may want to update the title/description on Graphite.

message.content: Sorry, you must also include products/signals as a whole

content: Now, update the PR description with `gh` following @.github/pull_request_template.md . Make it super informal like i'd write it, and keep the changes high-level really
